TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Almazbek_Atambayev, title = Almazbek_Atambayev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Almazbek_Atambayev} }

S.FORM: == Almazbek Atambayev == ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 9, Almazbek Atambayev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Kazakhstan ta' misuw hya' ga Almazbek Atambayev, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Atambayev htagan beh sa Northern region of Chui. 1980 kawas tmasoq hopa pqwasan biru. Almazbek Atambayev maki msqun ki Buazhar, maki 4 la'iy. Almazbek Atambayev maki tay kawas 1988 msqun ki Raisa Atambayeva, tehuk misuw qani. maki 6 la'iy. Aliya, Diana, Dinara, Seyit, Seytek, Khadyrbek ga la'iy ni Almazbek Atambayev. Atambayev hiya ga cyux sazing inqnxan. tequtux neril nya maki sazing kneril laqi ru sazing mlikuy laqi. tesazing neril nya maki qutux kneril laqi ru qutux mlikuy laqi. pinqbaqan nya Almazbek Atambayev mqwas biru sa Moscow pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Almazbek Atambayev hiya ga m'sezi, maki sa kawas 2000, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Almazbek Atambayev == ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 9, Almazbek Atambayev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Kazakhstan ta' misuw hya' ga Almazbek Atambayev, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Atambayev htagan beh sa Northern region of Chui. 1980 kawas tmasoq hopa pqwasan biru. Almazbek Atambayev maki msqun ki Buazhar, maki 4 la'iy. Almazbek Atambayev maki tay kawas 1988 msqun ki Raisa Atambayeva, tehuk misuw qani. maki 6 la'iy. Aliya, Diana, Dinara, Seyit, Seytek, Khadyrbek ga la'iy ni Almazbek Atambayev. Atambayev hiya ga cyux sazing inqnxan. tequtux neril nya maki sazing kneril laqi ru sazing mlikuy laqi. tesazing neril nya maki qutux kneril laqi ru qutux mlikuy laqi. pinqbaqan nya Almazbek Atambayev mqwas biru sa Moscow pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Almazbek Atambayev hiya ga m'sezi, maki sa kawas 2000, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == almazβek atamβaje* == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, almazβek atamβaje*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw kazakħs~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa almazβek atamβaje*, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja atamβaje* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa nortħern reɣion o* ʦ~ʨħui. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. almazβek atamβaje* maki ms~ɕqun ki βuazħar, maki * laʔij. almazβek atamβaje* maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki rais~ɕa atamβaje*a, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. maki * laʔij. alija, *iana, *inara, s~ɕejit, s~ɕejtek, kħa*jrβek ɣa laʔij ni almazβek atamβaje*. atamβaje* ħija ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ inqnxan. tequtux neril nja maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi ru s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi. tes~ɕaziŋ neril nja maki qutux kneril laqi ru qutux mlikuj laqi. pinqβaqan nja almazβek atamβaje* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa mos~ɕʦ~ʨow pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . mintzjuwaw nja almazβek atamβaje* ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi, maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
